topic: Someone finds a wallet containing a large sum of cash
raw_output:
[story 1]

The worn leather of the wallet felt unnervingly heavy in my palm. It was tucked beneath a park bench, and as I pulled it out, the sheer volume of bills made my breath hitch. A cascade of crisp currency spilled onto the damp grass. My heart began to hammer against my ribs, a frantic, uneven rhythm. I quickly tucked the wallet into my coat pocket, my fingers trembling slightly as I stood up. Every shadow seemed to deepen, and the distant sounds of the city seemed amplified, pressing in on me. I didn't want to be seen; I just wanted to be gone.

[story 2]

I found the purse near the entrance of the café. When I opened it, the sight of the bundled cash made my stomach clench with a cold, tight sensation. My hands started to shake so badly I had to grip the strap of my bag tightly. I stared at the money, unable to look away, the numbers blurring into an overwhelming visual assault. A sudden, sharp intake of air escaped my lungs. I fumbled for my keys, my movements jerky and clumsy, desperate to escape the immediate vicinity before anyone noticed the glittering prize.

[story 3]

It was a strange discovery, a thick, bulging wallet lying near the curb. When I finally managed to open it, the sheer quantity of money flooded my vision. A wave of intense unease washed over me, making my limbs feel heavy and unresponsive. I dropped it instantly, my eyes darting around the street as if expecting something to materialize from the surrounding buildings. I backed away slowly, my gaze fixed on the pavement, my jaw clenched so tightly I could feel the strain in my neck. I needed to move, now, before I did something foolish.
